title: Undertake sampling and testing of water
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake sampling and testing of water demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for sampling and testing fieldwork

pcs.text: Confirm sampling and testing program from supervisor instruction and sampling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sampling and testing program from supervisor instruction and sampling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sampling and testing program from supervisor instruction and sampling plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls for safe operating conditions and environmental impact of sampling and testing.
